server/tests/test_transform.py :: test_crop_rgb_extracts_region
def test_crop_rgb_extracts_region() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(20, 20)
    cropped = crop_rgb(raster, 5, 5, 8, 6)
    assert cropped.width == 8
    assert cropped.height == 6

server/tests/test_transform.py :: test_filter_sepia_changes_pixels
def test_filter_sepia_changes_pixels() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(2, 2, 10, 20, 200)
    sepia = filter_sepia(raster)
    assert sepia.data != raster.data

server/tests/test_transform.py :: test_filter_invert
def test_filter_invert() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(2, 2, 10, 20, 30)
    inverted = filter_invert(raster)
    assert inverted.data[0] == 245
    assert inverted.data[1] == 235

server/tests/test_transform.py :: test_apply_edits_resize
def test_apply_edits_resize() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(40, 30, 80, 90, 100)
    edited = apply_edits(
        raster,
        EditOptions(resize_width=20, resize_height=10),
    )
    assert edited.width == 20
    assert edited.height == 10

server/tests/test_transform.py :: test_filter_blur_softens_edges
def test_filter_blur_softens_edges() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(8, 8)
    blurred = filter_blur(raster, radius=1)
    assert blurred.data != raster.data

server/tests/test_transform.py :: test_filter_sharpen_increases_contrast
def test_filter_sharpen_increases_contrast() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(12, 12)
    sharpened = filter_sharpen(raster, amount=1.0)
    assert sharpened.data != raster.data
